title: TestCoverageTarget
description: The primary unit of test scope governance in a TestCoverageModel, identifying an artifact or functionality that requires test coverage per IEEE 829-2008 Section 5.2.3 (Features to be tested). A target may represent an API endpoint, UI component, business workflow, or integration point — each anchoring a set of CoverageRequirements and TestCaseSketches.

targetType.description: The kind of artifact or functionality requiring test coverage

priority.description: Relative importance of achieving coverage for this target

source.description: Source code reference for the artifact requiring test coverage
